endpoints.description: Archive.org structured search. Use output=json, rows, sort[]=downloads desc, and fl[]=identifier/title/date/downloads/runtime/collection/mediatype to list collection or media search results without clicking filters. browser_api_call compacts response.response.docs into items with metadata_url.
strategy_notes: Use advancedsearch as the list call, then call metadata only for top-ranked identifiers when duration or upload_date is missing.
Keep rows small, usually 5 or fewer, because the task only needs the top answer or a short ranking.

endpoints.description: Archive.org item metadata. Use after advancedsearch returns identifiers when upload date or duration is missing. browser_api_call compacts metadata and files into title, upload_date, duration, views_or_downloads, and item URL.
strategy_notes: Use metadata detail responses to verify missing media fields from the ranked list before answering.
